# RLS Policy Coverage Matrix — Baseline 2026-05-14

**Source:** `v_rls_policy_matrix` + `v_rls_table_coverage` + `find_unprotected_tables()` (migration `20261009000004_rls_policy_matrix.sql`)
**Generated by:** Claude Code (Opus 4.7 1M-ctx) via Supabase MCP, Phase 1 Day 4
**Spec reference:** `BRT_SUBSYSTEM_1_ORG_PROVISIONING.md` §4.2

## Summary

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| Total public tables | 360 |
| RLS-enabled | **360** (100%) |
| RLS-disabled | 0 |
| Tables with `organization_id` column | 45 |
| Org-scoped tables with full CRUD policies | **32** (was 26 pre-Day-4) |
| Org-scoped tables flagged by `find_unprotected_tables()` | **13** (was 19 pre-Day-4; all 13 are documented exemptions) |
| Tables without `organization_id` (project-scoped or system) | 315 |

## Day 4 remediation

7 of the 19 unprotected-org-table findings remediated by migration `brt_sub_1_unprotected_org_table_remediation`:

| Table | Added policy | Justification |
|---|---|---|
| `cancellation_reasons` | INSERT | User-driven on cancellation flow |
| `collab_doc_state` | SELECT | Org member realtime collab read |
| `org_api_tokens` | SELECT | Owner/admin reads org's API tokens |
| `org_sso_config` | SELECT | Owner/admin reads SSO config |
| `organization_members` | UPDATE | Owner promotes/demotes members |
| `outbound_webhooks` | SELECT | Owner/admin reads webhook config |
| `webhook_endpoints` | SELECT | Owner/admin reads endpoint config |

## Documented exemptions (13 tables)

These tables intentionally lack one or more CRUD policies because the writer is exclusively `service_role` (Stripe webhooks, append-only audit/logs, ephemeral presence). Each has a `COMMENT ON TABLE` recording the why.

| Table | Missing | Exemption rationale |
|---|---|---|
| `billing_customers` | INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE | Stripe webhook writes only |
| `cancellation_reasons` | UPDATE/DELETE | Append-only by design (user submits once) |
| `dunning_email_log` | INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE | Cron-driven via service_role |
| `invite_logs` | DELETE | Append-only audit |
| `invoices` | INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE | Stripe webhook writes only |
| `payment_methods` | INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE | Stripe webhook writes only |
| `presence_heartbeats` | all 4 | Ephemeral presence; service-role only |
| `presence_room_keys` | all 4 | Ephemeral presence; service-role only |
| `profiles` | DELETE | Cascades from auth.users delete; never client op |
| `search_index_dirty_flags` | all 4 | Internal flag table; service-role only |
| `slack_delivery_log` | UPDATE/DELETE | Append-only log |
| `subscriptions` | INSERT/DELETE | Stripe webhook creates; cancellation flips status |
| `usage_events` | UPDATE/DELETE | Append-only telemetry |

## Read-only mode restrictive coverage (Sub-4 §4.6)

Per `v_writable_restrictive_coverage`:
- **223 tables** carry the 3 restrictive `*_writable_*` policies (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE gated by `is_org_writable()` or `is_project_org_writable()`)
- **30 tables** exempt by design (billing, admin, audit, system, presence)
- **0 incomplete** — every non-exempt org-scoped or project-scoped table has the 3-restrictive set

## Drift detection

This baseline is the input for the nightly `rls-policy-drift` cron (Sub-1 §4.4, to be scaffolded Day 5). The cron:

1. Re-runs the policy matrix view
2. Diffs against this committed baseline
3. Posts a Slack alert to `#brt-alerts` if any policy was added/removed/modified without a corresponding baseline update

Re-running this baseline is part of any PR that touches RLS policies. The expected workflow:

```bash
# Pull current state
psql $SUPABASE_DB_URL -At -c "SELECT row_to_json(t) FROM v_rls_policy_matrix t" > artifacts/rls-matrix-current.jsonl
# Compare to baseline (manual diff for now; scripted in scripts/rls-matrix-audit.ts post-Day-5)
```

## Audit verification (run anytime)

```sql
-- Current state
SELECT * FROM v_rls_table_coverage WHERE has_org_id_column = true;
SELECT * FROM v_writable_restrictive_coverage WHERE is_exempt = false AND restrictive_policies < 3;
SELECT * FROM find_unprotected_tables();  -- Expected: 13 documented exemptions only
```

— Baseline locked 2026-05-14 by BRT Phase 1 Day 4 —
